footer_description: Bringing the authentic taste of Venezuela to Virginia. A cultural bridge built on masa and love.
hero_title: Una arepa es un abrazo en forma de masa
hero_subtitle: Experience the authentic taste of Venezuela right here in Glen Allen. Homemade, fresh, and full of history.

features.title: Family-Owned
features.description: A family business rooted in Venezuelan tradition, serving our community with pride.

features.title: Freshly Made
features.description: Every arepa is hand-formed and cooked to order, never frozen, always fresh.

features.title: Made with Love
features.description: Our recipes are passed down through generations, packed with authentic flavor.

features.title: Local Ingredients
features.description: We source our ingredients locally whenever possible to support our community.
